junit/src/main/java/com/telusko/learning.general_idea: Add a new method to compute the area of a circle based on its radius.
junit/src/main/java/com/telusko/learning.human_impl: public double computeCircleArea(double radius){ return Math.PI * Math.pow(radius,2); }
